jsCode: (function() { function scrape() { try { const data = {}; const goldSummary = document.querySelector('#gvData'); if (goldSummary) { goldSummary.querySelectorAll('.Trending_top3_label').forEach(label => { const name = label.innerText.trim().toUpperCase(); const value = label.parentElement.nextElementSibling?.innerText.trim() || ''; if (name.includes('GOLD($)')) data.gold = value; if (name === 'INR') data.inr = value; if (name.includes('GOLD COSTING')) data.goldMcx = value; }); } const silverSummary = document.querySelector('#gvData_Silver'); if (silverSummary) { silverSummary.querySelectorAll('.Trending_top3_label').forEach(label => { const name = label.innerText.trim().toUpperCase(); const value = label.parentElement.nextElementSibling?.innerText.trim() || ''; if (name === 'SILVER') data.silver = value; }); } document.querySelectorAll('#gvData_Trending_Silver .Script_Nameee').forEach(el => { const title = el.innerText.trim().toUpperCase(); if (title.includes('SILVER COSTING')) { const sellTd = el.parentElement.querySelectorAll('td')[2]; if (sellTd) { data.silverMcx = sellTd.innerText.trim(); } } }); if (Object.keys(data).length) { window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify(data)); } } catch (e) { window.ReactNativeWebView.postMessage(JSON.stringify({ error: e.message })); } } setTimeout(scrape, 5000); setInterval(scrape, 3000); })(); true;
